text:
みんなで海に来られるなんて。
ふふっ、とっても楽しみ！
行こ、ヒツギちゃん！

よーし、行くとしますか！
ハリエットさん、水着が慣れないって
言ってたけど、大丈夫そう？

は、はい……走ると胸が安定せず
若干の動きづらさはありますが……
大丈夫です。参りま
I never thought we'd get the chance to all go to the beach together. Hehe, I can't wait! Let's go, Hitsugi!
Yeah, no time to waste! Though, Hariette, you said you weren't used to wearing a swimsuit. Are you going to be okay?
Y-Yes. I have to admit that it is a bit difficult to run in this, but... I will be fine. Let us be off!
